summary: Ukrainian forces destroyed a Russian TOS-1A MLRS using a Bulava loitering munition followed by FPV drones, while the 66th Separate Mechanized Brigade evacuated a wounded soldier using the TerMIT unit’s systems. The 35th Marine Brigade’s 2nd Battalion reported successful operations against Russian UAVs, and FPV drones struck two Russian soldiers on motorcycles during an assault. Russian troops were also targeted by FPVs after one attempted to fake surrender and flee, and Ukrainian soldiers in the Kostiantynivka direction survived an FPV attack, likely detecting it via a drone detector.
